title: Chrome Screencast
description: Stream low-resolution Chrome screencast JPEG frames for the admin live progress UI.

CHROME_BINARY.description: Path to a Chromium-family browser binary

CHROME_SCREENCAST_ENABLED.description: Enable live browser preview frames for the admin live progress UI

CHROME_SCREENCAST_FPS.description: Maximum screencast JPEG frames written per second

CHROME_SCREENCAST_KEEP.description: Number of screencast frames to keep after Chrome exits (there is a separate screenshot plugin for real hi-res screenshots)

CHROME_SCREENCAST_SCALE.description: CDP screenshot clip scale for live preview frames
